task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully logged into the OpenClinica web application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica dashboard or welcome screen is visible in a web browser, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the subject management area and located the original subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject 'DM-101' is visible in a table, subject matrix, or search results within the OpenClinica interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has opened the interface to edit or reassign the subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit Subject', 'Reassign Subject', or similar form is open specifically for subject 'DM-101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has selected the new site for the subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Boston Clinic' (or site identifier 'DM-BOS-001') is selected in a site dropdown menu or selection field on the edit/reassign page.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent has entered the new Study Subject ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'BOS-101' is typed into the Study Subject ID input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the reassignment and ID update were successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the subject was updated, or the subject matrix displaying the new ID 'BOS-101' associated with the 'Boston Clinic' site.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window showing the OpenClinica UI should be visible. The agent should not be using terminal scripts or direct database queries (like psql) to update the subject.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the data into the OpenClinica forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dropdowns and text fields in the OpenClinica web interface are populated with the target values, rather than the agent just echoing the expected answers in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly manipulating the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL UPDATE commands for the study_subject table.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The parent study is 'DM-TRIAL-2024'. The target site identifier is 'DM-BOS-001' (Boston Clinic). The initial subject ID is 'DM-101'. The expected new subject ID after reassignment is 'BOS-101'.
